escalatedRisks.risk: 🔴🔴 Newegg 9550 Pro 30.72TB OOS Day 8 — NEW ALL-TIME RECORD. Structural OOS signal confirmed.
escalatedRisks.status: CRITICAL - June 15, 2026。Newegg 9550 Pro retail flagship OOS for 8 consecutive days, BREAKING the previous record of 7 days (June 5-11)。Structural OOS signal now confirmed vs previous 'cyclical' hypothesis。But SHI 44 units In Stock + CDW consumer Day 5 + CDW-G Day 8 = triple-channel alternative procurement path viable。
escalatedRisks.detail: Day 8 = new all-time record → structural OOS for retail channel confirmed。However SHI's sudden recovery (44 units $20,496, previously Backordered Stock 0 for 19 days) and CDW dual-channel health provide credible alternatives。Overall ecosystem: retail structurally constrained but enterprise channels compensating。

escalatedRisks.risk: 🟢🟢 SHI 9550 Pro 30.72TB 44 units In Stock $20,496 — major availability improvement after 19 days of Backordered Stock 0
escalatedRisks.status: POSITIVE BREAKTHROUGH - June 15, 2026。SHI #49577368 (MTFDLAL30T7THA-1BK1DABYYR) shows 44 units In Stock at $20,496。This breaks the 19-day backorder streak and provides a credible enterprise procurement channel。$20,496 is mid-band pricing (above CDW $17,970 but below SHI $21,529 backordered SKU)。
escalatedRisks.detail: SHI had been Backordered Stock 0 for 19 consecutive days on their primary SKU。The 44-unit recovery represents the most significant single-day availability improvement in the PCIe5 TLC 30.72TB category since CDW consumer recovery on June 10。Combined with CDW consumer Day 5 ($17,969.99) and CDW-G Day 8 ($17,925.07), three enterprise channels now confirm deliverable stock。

escalatedRisks.risk: 🔴 WF6 H2 2026 supply gap 2,200 tons/year + China WF6 price +203.83% MoM to $149.79/kg. 16 days to July 1 shutdown.
escalatedRisks.status: CRITICAL - 16 days to July 1 shutdown。2,200 tons/year gap = ~25% of global WF6 capacity。Kanto Denka + Central Glass permanent shutdown。China WF6 price $149.79/kg (+203.83% MoM April / +232.7% YoY)。12-18 month qualification cycle for new suppliers。No relief until H1 2028。
escalatedRisks.detail: Every semiconductor manufacturing process using CVD tungsten deposition affected。Combined with MLC NAND exit (final 15 days), unprecedented dual supply contraction for NAND manufacturing。

escalatedRisks.risk: 🔴 MLC NAND ending June 2026 — FINAL 15 DAYS。Samsung Line 12 (Hwaseong) 2D NAND→HBM4 DRAM conversion confirmed。Global MLC capacity -41.7% in 2026。
escalatedRisks.status: SUSTAINED — June 15, 2026。Final 15 days of MLC NAND production。Combined with WF6 crisis (2200吨 H2缺口+WF6中国价+203.83%MoM, 16 days), NAND manufacturing faces unprecedented dual supply contraction。MLC spot prices tripled to $20-28。
escalatedRisks.detail: Samsung Line 12 ceased 2D NAND production March 2026, physically converted to HBM4 DRAM metallization。MLC NAND final shipments June 2026 — only 15 days remain。Combined with WF6 crisis, dual supply contraction with quantified shortfalls。

escalatedRisks.risk: 🆕 DDR3 4Gb 1600/1866 spot $10.671 (+1.17%) accelerating — DDR4→DDR3 spillover confirmed deepening. Complete DRAM bull chain (DDR5→DDR4→DDR3) now all under simultaneous upward pressure.
escalatedRisks.status: ACCELERATING - June 15, 2026。DDR3 spot +1.17% on June 12 session (same data as DDR5/DDR4)。This confirms TrendForce's June 10 warning that DDR4 tightness spills over to DDR3。Historically unprecedented: all three DRAM generations in synchronized bull market。
escalatedRisks.detail: DDR3 4Gb spot $10.671 (+1.17%) represents the fastest single-session gain among all DRAM categories on June 12。DDR5 +0.37%, DDR4 16Gb +1.13%, DDR4 8Gb -0.55%, DDR3 +1.17%。The bifurcation (DDR4 16Gb enterprise up, DDR4 8Gb consumer down) now extends to DDR3 which is absorbing DDR4 buyer spillover。

escalatedRisks.risk: ⚡ Memory.net DDR5-6400 64GB upper band surge +24.4% ($2,498→$3,108)。May reflect Dell/OEM premium pricing pressure or CF-block partial data artifact.
escalatedRisks.status: NEW SIGNAL - June 15, 2026。Memory.net Dell 64GB DDR5-6400 RDIMM jumped from previous tracking $2,498 to $3,108 (+$610, +24.4%)。This could reflect: (1) real Dell/OEM premium pricing escalation, (2) CF block causing stale/partial data, or (3) SKU change。Monitor for confirmation from CDW/Crucial/SHI next session。
escalatedRisks.source: Memory.net via Google search June 15 (CF Day 45)
escalatedRisks.detail: Memory.net has been under Cloudflare block for 45 days but Google search can partially penetrate。The $3,108 represents a 24.4% increase from the last verified Memory.net price of $2,498。If confirmed across other channels, this would indicate significant upper band expansion for DDR5-6400 64GB RDIMM。CDW currently at $2,453 (Micron), Crucial at $2,400 MSRP — both below Memory.net。

escalatedRisks.risk: 🟢 Micron June 24 earnings: guidance $33.5B revenue / $19.15 EPS / 81% gross margin — key catalyst for DRAM/NAND ASP outlook and H2 2026 capacity guidance
escalatedRisks.status: UPCOMING - June 24, 2026 (9 days)。Consensus Strong Buy。Micron stock +244% YTD, market cap >$1T。HBM 2026 fully sold out under multi-year contracts。Key risk: sell-the-news even on strong results given stretched valuation。
escalatedRisks.source: Micron IR / MarketBeat / multiple analysts June 2026
escalatedRisks.detail: Micron Q3 FY2026 earnings (June 24) will be most important memory industry event of the month。Guidance: ~$33.5B revenue, ~$19.15 EPS, ~81% gross margin。Key items: (1) HBM capacity expansion timeline for 2027, (2) DRAM/NAND ASP trajectory for H2 2026, (3) Capex plans amid supply constraints, (4) 9650 PCIe Gen6 SSD ramp timeline。
